facebook.caption:
3,063 reviews. 4.8 stars. At a seafood spot most tourists never find.

Ann Seafood sits inside Bãi Khem, one of Phu Quoc's quietest corners. The kind of place locals eat while visitors queue at the same three spots on the main strip.

Fresh catch. Real prices. No performance.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 4.8 stars from 3,063 people and the tables are still half local. Watch what comes out of that kitchen at Ann Seafood, Bãi Khem. This is what a good seafood night in Phu Quoc actually looks like.

instagram.caption:
4.8 stars. 3,063 reviews. Ann Seafood at Bãi Khem is not a secret, just skipped.

Fresh catch, local crowd, zero fuss. Tag your travel buddy.
